titleStmt.title: SII 28.13: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 13. (A.R. No. 13 of 1913.) PERAMBALŪR, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is also part of the transaction detailed in Nos. 11 and 12 above. This is the authentication by the nāṭṭavar, of the setting apart of the 12 vēli of land (described again here) as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭa-iṟaiili effective from the date of the record i.e. from Avaṇi in the year 17+1 of the king. On the order of the nāṭṭavar, Alaṅgaḻi-uḍaiyāṉ Uḍaiya Śivan signed the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya
cuntara pāṇṭiya tevaṟku patiṉeḻāvati
ṉ Etirāmāṇṭu Āvaṇi māta mutalāka nam
pirāṭṭiyār teṉṉavaṉai muḻutumuṭaiyā
ḷ tirunāḷ paraṇiyile tirttamāka Iṉ
ṉāyaṉār tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷa Amutupaṭi
cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum vai
yiṟṟukku perumpalūr teṉparappi
le Aṉaittāṇṭum pāḻkiṭanta
nilattile patiṟṟu veliyum Inṉā
yaṉār(ṟ)ku tirunantavaṉappuṟa Iṟaiili
kku nilam Iruveliyum Āka nilam paṉ
ṉiru veliyum Innāḷ mutal tiruviṭai
yāṭṭa Iṟaiyiliyāka Ivvūr Ūravar I
ṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭut tirukkai malarile
Utakam paṇṇiṉapaṭiye tiruvāḻi Āḻ
vāraiyum Eḻuntaruḷivittu cantirā
tittavaṟk kāṇiyāka kalveṭṭik ko
ṇṭu tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷivikkavum pā
rpatu Ivai nāṭṭavar paṇiyāl Alaṅ
kaḻi Uṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiya ciyaṉe (e)ḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 28.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
